_comment: Per-category TTFT budgets in milliseconds. Aspirational, not gating. Update as the stack gets faster (or honest, if a model swap regresses).

qa.description: Pure-knowledge Q&A — no screen context expected.

screen-referential.description: User refers to something on screen. VLM context is in the prompt.

action.description: Agent-mode turn — planner expected to emit action tags.

multi-turn.description: Turn 3+ in a conversation. Tests history-prefill cost.
